blended.narrative: Pico Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 52°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
